states.name: Iowa

programs.name: Disabled Veteran Homestead Property Tax Credit
programs.blurb: Provides a full property tax exemption on the homestead for veterans with a 100% service-connected disability rating and for DIC recipients.

programs.name: Military Service Property Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Reduces the assessed value of a qualifying veteran's home for property tax purposes based on active-duty service.

programs.name: Injured Veterans Grant
programs.blurb: Grant of up to $10,000 for service members seriously injured in the line of duty in a combat or hazardous-duty zone after September 11, 2001, so family can be present during recovery.

programs.name: Iowa Veterans Home
programs.blurb: State long-term care facility in Marshalltown providing professionally managed health care for honorably discharged veterans and their spouses or widows.

programs.name: Lifetime Hunting and Fishing License for Veterans
programs.blurb: Qualifying Iowa resident veterans who served on active federal service can obtain a lifetime hunting or fishing license for a nominal $7 fee.

programs.name: Home Base Iowa
programs.blurb: Statewide initiative linking Iowa businesses with qualified veterans and their spouses for career, education, and community-transition opportunities.

states.notes: Injured Veterans Grant dollar cap is statutory. Iowa Veterans Home and Home Base Iowa cited via IDVA state-benefits page.

states.name: Kansas

programs.name: Property Tax Relief Claim for Seniors and Disabled Veterans (K-40SVR)
programs.blurb: Homestead property tax refund for Kansas resident veterans with a service-connected disability rating of 50% or greater and their surviving spouses, subject to income and home-value limits.

programs.name: Military Retirement Pay State Income Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: U.S. military retirement pay and VA disability payments are not subject to Kansas state income tax.

programs.name: Kansas Military Service Scholarship
programs.blurb: Pays undergraduate tuition and required fees for up to eight semesters at public Kansas institutions for qualifying veterans who served in recognized hostile-fire areas.

programs.name: Veterans' Preference in State Employment
programs.blurb: Qualified veterans receive hiring preference for Kansas state government positions designated as Veterans Preference Eligible (VPE).

programs.name: Kansas State Veterans Homes
programs.blurb: State-run long-term nursing and assisted-living care at the Kansas Soldiers' Home (Fort Dodge), the Kansas Veterans' Home (Winfield), and the Northeast Kansas Veterans' Home (Topeka).

programs.name: Disabled Veterans Hunting and Fishing License
programs.blurb: Free permanent hunting and fishing licenses for honorably discharged Kansas resident veterans with a service-connected disability of at least 30%.

states.notes: Agency recently rebranded from Kansas Commission on Veterans Affairs Office (kcva.ks.gov) to Kansas Office of Veterans Services (kovs.ks.gov).

states.name: Kentucky

programs.name: Homestead Exemption for Totally Disabled Veterans
programs.blurb: Veterans rated totally disabled from a service-connected condition receive a homestead exemption that reduces the taxable value of their home, with the amount recalculated every two years for inflation.

programs.name: Kentucky Tuition Waiver (KRS 164.507/164.515)
programs.blurb: Waives tuition at Kentucky state-supported colleges, universities, and vocational-technical schools for dependents, spouses, and unremarried widows of veterans who are 100% disabled, permanently and totally disabled, deceased, or POW/MIA.

programs.name: Military Retirement Pay Income Tax Exclusion
programs.blurb: Military retired pay for those who retired before January 1, 1998 is fully exempt from Kentucky income tax, and later retirees may exclude retirement income up to a statutory cap.

programs.name: Kentucky State Veterans Centers
programs.blurb: Four state-operated long-term nursing facilities provide skilled care for Kentucky veterans, with online admission applications.

programs.name: Veterans' Preference in State Employment
programs.blurb: Kentucky state hiring managers must offer interviews to qualified veterans under the state's veterans preference rules.

programs.name: Disabled Veteran Hunting and Fishing License
programs.blurb: Kentucky veterans with a service-connected disability rating above 50% qualify for a special reduced-cost hunting and fishing license.

states.notes: Homestead exemption dollar amount is inflation-adjusted biennially, so the figure is omitted. State benefits summary PDF (March 2023) used as source for preference and license details.

states.name: Louisiana

programs.name: Disabled Veterans Additional Property Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Veterans with a service-connected disability rating of 50% or higher receive additional assessed-value exemptions beyond the standard homestead exemption, and 100% disabled veterans are exempt from all ad valorem property tax on their primary residence.

programs.name: Title 29 Dependents' Educational Assistance
programs.blurb: In-state tuition exemption at Louisiana public colleges for children, spouses, and surviving spouses of veterans rated at least 90% service-connected disabled (including Individual Unemployability), deceased, or POW/MIA.

programs.name: Louisiana Veterans Homes
programs.blurb: LDVA operates five state veterans homes offering long-term care to honorably discharged veterans with 90 days of active duty, their spouses, and Gold Star parents.

programs.name: State and City Civil Service Veterans' Preference
programs.blurb: Louisiana state and city civil service award a five- to ten-point preference in original appointment to veterans who served honorably in the U.S. Armed Forces.

programs.name: Military Retirement Pay State Income Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Military retirement benefits are fully exempt from Louisiana state income tax.

programs.name: Free Hunting and Fishing Licenses for Disabled Veterans
programs.blurb: Veterans with a permanent service-connected disability rating of 50% or greater qualify for free Louisiana hunting and fishing licenses.

programs.name: LaVetCorps Student Veteran Navigators
programs.blurb: AmeriCorps-partnered navigators staff student veteran centers at Louisiana public colleges and universities to help veterans complete academic goals and transition home.

states.notes: LDVA also staffs roughly 74 veteran service offices statewide for claims assistance.
